run_summary.summary: Picked up 1 new inbound opportunity — Touchstone Home via Picking Daisies Media (your PR firm). They're building an ambassador/affiliate program and sent a firm offer to the full roster. Compensation TBD — could be paid or gifted depending on credentials and product. Liz needs to decide if she wants to pursue: apply via Awin + fill out the questionnaire. Deadlines are noted as tight so worth a quick look today.

suggestions.message: Mariah at Picking Daisies sent a firm offer for Touchstone Home's ambassador/affiliate program — went to the full roster so this is first-come. No rate confirmed yet (could be gifted or paid — they make electric fireplaces/home products so product value could be $500+). If Liz is interested: (1) sign up for the Awin affiliate program, and (2) fill out the attached questionnaire ('Touchstone Home Products SOCIAL INFLUENCER Questions - 2026.docx') and send to her manager. Deadline likely tight.

deals.next_action: Decide if interested in Touchstone Home opportunity — if yes, sign up for Awin affiliate program and fill out questionnaire, send to Mariah at Picking Daisies
deals.notes: [Apr 26]: Firm offer via Picking Daisies Media (Liz's PR firm). Touchstone Home building ambassador/affiliate program. Compensation unclear — email says it 'may be 100% gratis' depending on credentials, timing, and specific product. They make electric fireplaces and home products (potentially $500+ product value). Sent to full PR roster. To apply: (1) join Awin affiliate network at touchstonehomeproducts.com/pages/join-the-touchstone-home-products-affiliate-program, (2) fill out attached questionnaire 'Touchstone Home Products SOCIAL INFLUENCER Questions - 2026.docx' and send to manager.
